locations.name: Clearing in the woods
descriptions: A clearing in a eucalyptus forest near the Uruguay River
You can hear the sound of the animals that live in the trees of this forest.

locations.name: Silent zone
descriptions: The forest continues in this part
Unlike the previous area, this area is very silent and not even the slightest sound can be heard.

obstacle.name: Puzzle
descriptions: A strong magic is generating an impassable wall
Magically, as you get closer, some blue letters appear explaining what the riddle to solve is.
obstacle.problem: You have to whisper the name of the river located on the southern coast of the Banda Oriental

locations.name: Cell
descriptions: A square cell of two square meters
The interior is full of plants that grew outside

items.name: Firewall
descriptions: The flames are very hot
It's 3 metres high
It is impossible to cross them, neither walking, nor running, nor jumping.

items.name: Guitar
descriptions: A classic guitar with 6 strings
It sounds great

items.name: Pond
descriptions: A pond full of crystal clear water
The water is so clear that it works like a mirror

items.name: Writings
descriptions: There is something written on the wall.
It says 'You have to trust in the powers that have been given to you.'

characters.name: José Artigas
descriptions: Uruguay's national hero
He is very weak after being locked up for so long.

player.name: Venancio
descriptions: A Uruguayan gaucho in his 40s
He belongs to the Artigas army
He has the magical power to summon a giant wave of water with which he can put out fires or moisten the ground.
